raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "performative self-affirmation declaring a shift toward reduced striving and greater receptivity",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "ease, rest, clarity, and flow are inherently available without prior justification or merit",
    "effort is frequently habitual rather than necessary",
    "simplicity is often already present and can be recognized",
    "resistance to life is optional and can be released",
    "these shifts are currently occurring for the speaker"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a consistent set of parallel intentions all oriented toward minimizing unnecessary effort and justification",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker or reader experiences psychological benefit from rehearsing these intentions and the statements align with their actual capacity to act on them without denial of real constraints",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statements are treated as literal descriptions of external reality rather than subjective intentions, or they are used to rationalize avoidance of necessary action or accountability"
}
